title: eruca vesicaria var. cappadocica
intro: Eruca vesicaria var. cappadocica, also known as wild rocket or mountain rocket, is a variety of the Eruca vesicaria plant, a member of the Brassicaceae family. This plant is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Eruca vesicaria var. cappadocica include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system, as well as potentially reducing the risk of certain cancers. In herbal preparations, the leaves and stems of the plant can be used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, making it a popular ingredient in natural remedies.
